name: Cornmeal Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Instant non fat dry milk
recipeInstructions:
6 pancakes, 90 calories each
1. Mix the dry ingredients together.
2. Beat the egg and water in a bowl. Add the melted margarine to the mixture. Stir until all the dry ingredients are just moistened. The batter will be lumpy.
3. Pour about 3 tablespoons of batter onto a hot griddle or frying pan for each pancake. Cook until you see bubbles on the surface and the edges start to look dry.
4. Flip the pancakes and cook the other side until it is browned.
